de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions

Class MayExpandMethodCondition

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.VariableConditionAdapter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions.MayExpandMethodCondition
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VariableCondition

    public final class MayExpandMethodCondition
extends VariableConditionAdapter
    ensures that the given instantiation for the schemavariable denotes a method whose body may be expanded. For determining the method the callee and the arguments of the method are needed as arguments.

    A method may be inlinded if:

    • the method is private, or
    • the method is static, or
    • the method is final, or
    • the receiver class is final, or
    • the corresponding taclet option is set to relaxed inlining.

    • Constructor Detail

      • MayExpandMethodCondition

        public MayExpandMethodCondition(SchemaVariable receiver,
                                SchemaVariable methname,
                                SchemaVariable args,
                                boolean negation)
        Instantiate a new variable condition.
        Parameters:
        negation - true iff the condition is to be negated
        receiver - program schema var for the receiver, may be null for class-local calls
        methname - non-null program schema var for the methodname
        args - non-null program schema var for the arguments of the call
        negation - true iff the condition is to be negated

      • MayExpandMethodCondition

        public MayExpandMethodCondition(SchemaVariable methodName,
                                SchemaVariable args,
                                boolean negation)

    • Method Detail

      • check

        public boolean check(SchemaVariable var,
                     SVSubstitute subst,
                     SVInstantiations svInst,
                     Services services)
        Description copied from class: VariableConditionAdapter
        checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
        Specified by:
        check in class VariableConditionAdapter
        Parameters:
        var - the template Variable to be instantiated
        svInst - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
        services - the program information object
        Returns:
        true iff condition is fulfilled
